title: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 Day 1: Software Factories & Keynotes
summary: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 Day 1 livestream from San Francisco featuring keynote sessions and main-stage programming on software factories and AI engineering. The event runs June 30, 2026 at Moscone West with sessions scheduled throughout the day.
writeup: This video is the Day 1 livestream of the AI Engineer World's Fair 2026, held June 30, 2026 at Moscone West in San Francisco, covering keynote sessions and main-stage programming centered on software factories and AI engineering. It captures the opening day of a multi-day conference focused on the practice of building with AI. The schedule runs throughout the day, with sessions organized around the software factories theme.
